  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhs to Masga-
nas Trauku / starp to Sa-
hanas Telti / un starp to Al-
i lift / un tew buhs Uhdeni
ch ta turreht.

Pehz to buhs tew to Pa-
nu wissapkahrt stahdiht/ un
buhs to Apfeggu pee Pagal-
Wahrtim pakahrt.

Tad buhs tew Swaidi-
nas-Etji xemt / un apfwat-
to Dshwokli/ un wiffu/ kas
ta irr/ un teiw buhs to fiveh-
r wisfeem winna Rihkeem/
s fwchts effus.

Tew buhs arridsan to
ama-Uppura-Altari / un
is wipza Rihkns fwaidiht/
w buhs to Altari fivehtiht/
s Altaris to fivehtu Leetu
htiba effus.

Tad buhs tew to Masga-
nas Trauku/ un winna Kah-
vatdiht / un tew buhs to
iht.

Tew buhs arridsan Aäro-
in winna Dehlus peewest / 
ch tahs Sa-eeschanas Telts
vim/ un tew buhs tohs ar
i masgaht.

Tew buhs Aäronam tahs
as Drehbes apwilkt / un
a fwaidiht/ un winna fiveh-
ka tas uans Preesteris

Tew buhs arridsan win-
eblus peewest/ un teem tohs
hrkns apwilkt.

Un tew buhs tohs fwai-
ttfin ka tu winno Tehwn"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Swaidijis effi/ ka tee mannee Pree-
stexi effus/ un tas notiks/ ka teem
winnu Swaidischana buhs par
weenu Preesterxo-Ammatu muh-
scham / pee winno Pehznahta-
meem.

16. Un Mohsus darrija pehz
wiffu/ ka tas KUNGS win-
xam bija pawehletjis/ ta darrija
winsch.

17. Un tas notikke ohtrâ Gad-
dâ / pirmâ Mehnefi / pirmâ
Mehnes(Deenâ) tappe tasDsh-
woklis uhszelts.

18. Jo Mohsus uszehle to
Dshwokli/ un likke winna Kah-
jas/ un uszehle winna Galdus/
un likke winna aisfchaujamas
Kahrtis / un uszehle winna
Stabbus.

19. Un winsch issteepe to Tel-
ti pahr to Dshwekli / un likke
tahs Telts Apseggu tur wirfu/
ittin ka tas KUNGS Mohsum
bij pawehlejis.

20. Un winsch nehme/ un likke
to Leezibu Schkirsta / un likke
tahs neffamas Kahrtis / pee ta
Schkirsta / un zehle to Salih-
dsinaachanas-Wahkn wirs to
Schkirstu.

21. Un winsch nefte to Schkir-
stu eeksch to Dshwokli/un winsch
uhskahre ta Apfegga Preekfh-
welkamu/un aisfedse to Leezibas-
Schkirstu/itten ka tas KUNGS
Mohsum parvehlejis bija.

22. Un winsch nefte to Galdu
eeksch to Sa-eeschanas Telti/ un
likke to Dshwokta Sahnôs /
prett"
    }
